GIVING AND RECEIVING
FEEDBACK
PART ONE:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 35 --

WHY? THE FASTEST WAY FOR YOU TO
GROW IN YOUR ROLE AS A LEADER IS BY
GROWING THOSE WHO REPORT TO YOU
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 35 --

WHAT’S THE FASTEST WAY
TO GROW SOMEONE?
FEEDBACK.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 35 --

ITS LIKE LOSING WEIGHT...IF YOU WANT SOMEONE
TO AT THE LEAST, STOP GAINING WEIGHT - JUST
HAVE THEM WEIGH THEMSELVES DAILY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 35 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 35 --

IT IS IN OUR NATURE TO RESPOND FASTER TO
OUTSIDE FEEDBACK THAN INTERNAL FEEDBACK
ITS LIKE WITH GYM LAUNCH, PEOPLE VALUE
FAST AND HONEST FEEDBACK!
THAT HELPS THEM SAVE MONEY AND LEARN
FASTER.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 35 --

WITHOUT TIMELY AND HONEST FEEDBACK
YOUR GROWTH IS ALWAYS LIMITED.
NO MATTER HOW SELF AWARE YOU THINK YOU
ARE, YOU HAVE BLIND SPOTS AS DO YOUR
SUPERVISORS AND DIRECT REPORTS
TIMELY = IMMEDIATELY AFTER ACTION
HONEST = CRITICAL IF NEED BE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 35 --

THE 3 PIECES OF HEALTHY FEEDBACK
1. HONEST
2. TIMELY
3. HELPFUL
HEALTHY FEEDBACK IS...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 35 --

RULES FOR RECEIVING
FEEDBACK
PART 1:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 35 --

1) BREAK UP WITH THE IDEA FEEDBACK IS NEGATIVE.
THINK OF THE PEOPLE WHO HAVE HELPED
YOU MOST IN LIFE (PARENTS,TEACHER,ETC)
WERE THEY MORE FOCUSED ON YOU
SUCCEEDING OR YOU LIKING THEM?
DO NOT DREAD FEEDBACK, CRAVE IT.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 35 --

2) IT’S A
DO NOT A
WHO
REFUSE TO HIDE BEHIND AN EXCUSE...
“THAT’S JUST HOW I AM”
“I’VE ALWAYS BEEN THAT WAY”
“I’VE NEVER BEEN GOOD AT THIS…”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 35 --

THAT IS A FIXED MINDSET...THE TRUTH IS
YOU HAVE THE ABILITY TO CHANGE
YOUR PERFORMANCE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 35 --

AND 99% OF THE TIME, WHAT TRIGGERS
YOU TO GET THE MOST DEFENSIVE WHEN
RECEIVING FEEDBACK, IS WHERE YOU
REALLY NEED TO LISTEN..
(BECAUSE IT IS USUALLY AN ANGER
WE HAVE WITH OURSELVES)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 35 --

3) ASK CLARIFYING QUESTIONS
GENERAL QUESTIONS LEAD TO
GENERAL ANSWERS AND GENERAL
ANSWERS LEAD TO GENERAL ACTIONS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 35 --

CAN YOU GIVE ME AN EXAMPLE?
WHAT SPECIFICALLY COULD I DO BETTER NEXT TIME?
WHAT WOULD AN IDEAL SCENARIO LOOK LIKE GOING FORWARD?
HOW WOULD YOU HAVE LIKED ME TO HANDLE THIS?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 35 --

GIVING FEEDBACK
PART 2:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 35 --

THERE ARE 2 KEY PIECES
WHEN?
WHO?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 35 --

1) WHEN?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 35 --

IF THE FIRST TIME YOU GIVE SOMEONE
FEEDBACK IS DURING A PERFORMANCE
REVIEW, YOU ARE TOO LATE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 35 --

YOU NEED TO NORMALIZE GIVING FEEDBACK.
GIVE IT IMMEDIATELY.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 35 --

WHEN
NOT TO GIVE FEEDBACK
RIGHT BEFORE THEY HAVE TO PERFORM AT
THEIR JOB AND HAVE A LOT OF PRESSURE
(MEETING, PRESENTATION, ETC…)
IN PUBLIC WHEN IT HAD NOTHING TO
DO WITH THE REST OF THE TEAM
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 35 --

PUBLIC FEEDBACK IS ONLY ACCEPTABLE IF IT IS
SOMETHING THE REST OF THE TEAM ADDRESSED
WITH THE PERSON AS WELL AND IT IS THE TEAM
WHO HOLDS THIS PERSON ACCOUNTABLE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 35 --

#2 HOW?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 35 --

FIRST OFF YOU WANT TO EXPLAIN
WHAT IS NOT HAPPENING.
“YOU ARE NOT LOSING YOUR JOB”
“YOU ARE NOT GETTING FIRED.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 35 --

THIS THEN ALLOWS THE TEAM MEMBER TO
FEEL A SENSE OF SAFETY BECAUSE YOU HAVE
ELIMINATED THEIR BIGGEST FEAR.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 35 --

HOW?
PICK THE 1-2 AREAS OF FEEDBACK YOU
BELIEVE WILL BRING THE BEST ROI
TELL THEM EXACTLY WHAT THEY
CAN DO TO IMPROVE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 35 --

IN MOST CASES IT IS FIT TO EXPLAIN THAT
RARELY DOES A TEAM MEMBER DO SOMETHING
TO INTENTIONALLY HURT THE TEAM.
HOWEVER INTENTION DOES NOT
ALWAYS EQUAL IMPACT.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 35 --

HOW DO YOU SPEAK?
PEOPLE MAY HEAR YOUR WORDS BUT THEY FEEL
YOUR ATTITUDE. YOU MUST GO INTO THIS MEETING
UNEMOTIONAL AND COME FROM A PLACE OF LOGIC.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 35 --

GIVING FEEDBACK TO
YOUR BOSS
PART 3:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 35 --

IF YOU WANT TO FEEL COMFORTABLE GIVING
YOUR BOSS FEEDBACK, YOU NEED TO ENSURE
YOU ARE DOING THE FOLLOWING SO THAT YOU
HAVE THE RIGHT ENVIRONMENT TO GIVE IT!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 35 --

1. YOU HONOR YOUR BOSS AND
RECOGNIZE THEM
DO YOU ACCEPT CRITICISM WELL FROM
THOSE WHO NEVER ENCOURAGE YOU?
WHEN IS THE LAST TIME YOU
COMPLIMENTED OR SHOWED
GRATITUDE TO YOUR BOSS?
ANY PERSON OF AUTHORITY IS MORE
LIKELY TO BE RECEPTIVE TO FEEDBACK
IF THEY HAVE HAD AN ABUNDANCE
MORE OF POSITIVE INTERACTIONS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 35 --

IF YOU HAVE FEEDBACK AROUND A
PROJECT/INTERACTION/DECISION - BE
PREPARED TO TELL THEM WHAT YOU
THINK COULD HAVE BEEN DONE TO
MAKE IT BETTER FOR THE TEAM
2. BE PREPARED WITH SOLUTIONS/SUGGESTIONS
TO YOUR CRITICAL FEEDBACK
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 35 --

3. DON’T SUGAR COAT IT, BE TRUTHFUL
TRUTH TRUMPS FLATTERY
YOUR BOSS MAY NOT BE “HAPPY” WITH YOUR FEEDBACK,
BUT THEY WILL BE GRATEFUL FOR IT LATER.
THOSE IN THE HIGHEST POSITIONS OF AUTHORITY OFTEN
RECEIVE THE LEAST FEEDBACK AND INSTEAD GET CONTINUOUS
FLATTERY WITH NO IDEA WHAT THEY COULD DO TO IMPROVE
WHY?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 35 --

HOW DO YOU GIVE IT?
PICK THE 1-2 AREAS OF FEEDBACK YOU
BELIEVE WILL BRING THE BEST ROI
TELL THEM EXACTLY WHAT THEY CAN DO TO
IMPROVE/COME WITH SUGGESTIONS
DO NOT ACT OR SPEAK OUT OF EMOTION. IF YOU
ARE EMOTIONALLY CHARGED ABOUT A SUBJECT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 35 --

Q: HAS FEEDBACK YOU HAVE RECEIVED EVER ANGERED YOU?
Q: DO YOU FEEL LIKE YOU GIVE REAL AND HONEST
FEEDBACK TO ALL YOUR DIRECT REPORTS?
Q: HOW CAN WE AS A TEAM NORMALIZE FEEDBACK
MORE TO THE POINT WHERE IT BECOMES HABIT?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 35 --
